LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT FRANKLIN SQUARE HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT (PAGE 3 OF 3, PARAGRAPH 14, SUBPART (A) LINE (2): "PUNITIVE DAMAGES"). NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. THE COURT DID NOT RECEIVE COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS AS REQUIRED BY LOCAL RULE 2.6B. DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-16-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT FRANKLIN SQUARE HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.
No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: sustained with ten days leave to amend. The court did not receive courtesy copies of the opposition papers as required by Local Rule 2.6B. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: Sonia Wong, CSR #11288

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-16-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT FRANKLIN SQUARE HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT (Page 3 of 3, Paragraph 14, subpart (a) line (2): "punitive damages").
No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: granted with ten days leave to amend. The court did not receive courtesy copies of the opposition papers as required by Local Rule 2.6B. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: Sonia Wong, CSR #11288
